#LineLine coverage
 1namespace SWLOR.Test.Shared.NWScriptMocks
 2{
 3    public partial class NWScriptServiceMock
 4    {
 5        // Mock data storage for achievements and vibration
 16        private readonly Dictionary<uint, HashSet<string>> _unlockedAchievements = new();
 17        private readonly List<VibrationRecord> _vibrationHistory = new();
 8
 9        private class VibrationRecord
 10        {
 011            public uint Player { get; set; }
 012            public int Motor { get; set; }
 013            public float Strength { get; set; }
 014            public float Seconds { get; set; }
 15        }
 16
 17        /// <summary>
 18        /// Vibrates the player's device or controller. Does nothing if vibration is not supported.
 19        /// </summary>
 20        /// <param name="oPlayer">The player whose device should vibrate</param>
 21        /// <param name="nMotor">One of the VIBRATOR_MOTOR_* constants</param>
 22        /// <param name="fStrength">Vibration strength between 0.0 and 1.0</param>
 23        /// <param name="fSeconds">Number of seconds to vibrate</param>
 24        public void Vibrate(uint oPlayer, int nMotor, float fStrength, float fSeconds)
 025        {
 026            _vibrationHistory.Add(new VibrationRecord
 027            {
 028                Player = oPlayer,
 029                Motor = nMotor,
 030                Strength = fStrength,
 031                Seconds = fSeconds
 032            });
 033        }
 34
 35        /// <summary>
 36        /// Unlocks an achievement for the given player who must be logged in.
 37        /// </summary>
 38        /// <param name="oPlayer">The player for whom to unlock the achievement</param>
 39        /// <param name="sId">The achievement ID on the remote server</param>
 40        /// <param name="nLastValue">The previous value of the associated achievement stat (default: 0)</param>
 41        /// <param name="nCurValue">The current value of the associated achievement stat (default: 0)</param>
 42        /// <param name="nMaxValue">The maximum value of the associated achievement stat (default: 0)</param>
 43        public void UnlockAchievement(uint oPlayer, string sId, int nLastValue = 0, int nCurValue = 0,
 44            int nMaxValue = 0)
 045        {
 046            if (!_unlockedAchievements.ContainsKey(oPlayer))
 047                _unlockedAchievements[oPlayer] = new HashSet<string>();
 048            _unlockedAchievements[oPlayer].Add(sId);
 049        }
 50
 51        // Helper methods for testing
 52
 53
 54
 55
 56    }
 57}

 1using SWLOR.NWN.API.Engine;
 2using SWLOR.NWN.API.NWScript.Enum;
 3
 4namespace SWLOR.Test.Shared.NWScriptMocks
 5{
 6    public partial class NWScriptServiceMock
 7    {
 8        // Mock data storage for actions
 19        private readonly Dictionary<uint, List<ActionRecord>> _actionQueues = new();
 110        private readonly List<DelayedAction> _delayedActions = new();
 111        private readonly List<ActionRecord> _actionHistory = new();

 16        private class ActionRecord
 17        {
 018            public ActionType Type { get; set; }
 019            public uint Target { get; set; }
 020            public Location Destination { get; set; }
 021            public string Data { get; set; } = "";
 022            public float Value1 { get; set; }
 023            public float Value2 { get; set; }
 024            public float Value3 { get; set; }
 025            public bool Bool1 { get; set; }
 026            public bool Bool2 { get; set; }
 027            public bool Bool3 { get; set; }
 028            public int Int1 { get; set; }
 029            public int Int2 { get; set; }
 030            public int Int3 { get; set; }
 31        }
 32
 33        private class DelayedAction
 34        {
 035            public float DelaySeconds { get; set; }
 036            public ActionRecord Action { get; set; }
 037            public float RemainingTime { get; set; }
 38        }

 40        private class FollowData
 41        {
 042            public uint Target { get; set; }
 043            public float Distance { get; set; }
 44        }
 45
 46        private class ConversationData
 47        {
 048            public uint Target { get; set; }
 049            public string DialogResRef { get; set; } = "";
 050            public bool IsPrivate { get; set; }
 051            public bool PlayHello { get; set; }
 052            public bool IsPaused { get; set; }
 53        }
 54
 55        public void AssignCommand(uint oActionSubject, Action aActionToAssign)
 056        {
 057            if (!_actionQueues.ContainsKey(oActionSubject))
 058                _actionQueues[oActionSubject] = new List<ActionRecord>();
 59
 60            // Note: Action delegate can't be easily stored, so we'll track the assignment
 061            _actionHistory.Add(new ActionRecord
 062            {
 063                Type = ActionType.MoveToPoint,
 064                Target = oActionSubject
 065            });
 066        }
 67
 68        public void DelayCommand(float fSeconds, Action aActionToDelay)
 069        {
 070            _delayedActions.Add(new DelayedAction
 071            {
 072                DelaySeconds = fSeconds,
 073                RemainingTime = fSeconds,
 074                Action = new ActionRecord { Type = ActionType.Wait }
 075            });
 076        }
 77
 78        public void ActionDoCommand(Action aActionToDo)
 079        {
 080            _actionHistory.Add(new ActionRecord { Type = ActionType.MoveToPoint });
 081        }
 82
 83        public void ClearAllActions(bool nClearCombatState = false, uint oObject = OBJECT_INVALID)
 084        {
 085            if (oObject == OBJECT_INVALID)
 086            {
 087                _actionQueues.Clear();
 088                if (nClearCombatState)
 089                    _combatStates.Clear();
 090            }
 91            else
 092            {
 093                _actionQueues.Remove(oObject);
 094                if (nClearCombatState)
 095                    _combatStates.Remove(oObject);
 096            }
 097        }

 1using SWLOR.NWN.API.NWScript.Enum;
 2
 3namespace SWLOR.Test.Shared.NWScriptMocks
 4{
 5    public partial class NWScriptServiceMock
 6    {
 7        // Mock data storage for alignment and reputation
 18        private readonly Dictionary<uint, AlignmentData> _creatureAlignment = new();
 19        private readonly Dictionary<string, ReputationData> _reputationData = new();
 10
 11        private class AlignmentData
 12        {
 013            public int LawChaosValue { get; set; } = 50;
 014            public int GoodEvilValue { get; set; } = 50;
 015            public AlignmentType LawChaosAlignment => LawChaosValue switch
 016            {
 017                < 33 => AlignmentType.Lawful,
 018                > 66 => AlignmentType.Chaotic,
 019                _ => AlignmentType.Neutral
 020            };
 021            public AlignmentType GoodEvilAlignment => GoodEvilValue switch
 022            {
 023                < 33 => AlignmentType.Evil,
 024                > 66 => AlignmentType.Good,
 025                _ => AlignmentType.Neutral
 026            };
 27        }
 28
 29        public class ReputationData
 30        {
 031            public ReputationType Type { get; set; } = ReputationType.Neutral;
 032            public bool Decays { get; set; } = false;
 033            public float DurationSeconds { get; set; } = 180.0f;
 034            public float RemainingTime { get; set; } = 180.0f;
 35        }
 36
 37        public enum ReputationType
 38        {
 39            Neutral,
 40            Friend,
 41            Enemy
 42        }
 43
 44        /// <summary>
 45        /// Adjusts the alignment of the specified subject.
 46        /// </summary>
 47        /// <param name="oSubject">The subject whose alignment to adjust</param>
 48        /// <param name="nAlignment">The alignment type to adjust:
 49        /// - ALIGNMENT_LAWFUL/ALIGNMENT_CHAOTIC/ALIGNMENT_GOOD/ALIGNMENT_EVIL: Subject's alignment will be shifted in t
 50        /// - ALIGNMENT_ALL: nShift will be added to subject's law/chaos and good/evil alignment values
 51        /// - ALIGNMENT_NEUTRAL: nShift is applied to subject's law/chaos and good/evil alignment values in the directio
 52        /// <param name="nShift">The desired shift in alignment. The shift will at most take the alignment value to 50 a
 53        /// <param name="bAllPartyMembers">When true, the alignment shift also has a diminished effect on all members of
 54        /// <remarks>No return value. For example, if subject has a law/chaos value of 10 (chaotic) and a good/evil valu
 55        public void AdjustAlignment(uint oSubject, AlignmentType nAlignment, int nShift,
 56            bool bAllPartyMembers = true)
 057        {
 058            if (!_creatureAlignment.ContainsKey(oSubject))
 059                _creatureAlignment[oSubject] = new AlignmentData();
 60
 061            var data = _creatureAlignment[oSubject];
 62
 063            switch (nAlignment)
 64            {
 65                case AlignmentType.Lawful:
 066                    data.LawChaosValue = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(100, data.LawChaosValue + nShift));
 067                    break;
 68                case AlignmentType.Chaotic:
 069                    data.LawChaosValue = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(100, data.LawChaosValue - nShift));
 070                    break;
 71                case AlignmentType.Good:
 072                    data.GoodEvilValue = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(100, data.GoodEvilValue + nShift));
 073                    break;
 74                case AlignmentType.Evil:
 075                    data.GoodEvilValue = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(100, data.GoodEvilValue - nShift));
 076                    break;
 77            }
 078        }
 79
 80        /// <summary>

 82        /// </summary>
 83        /// <param name="oCreature">The creature to get the alignment value for</param>
 84        /// <returns>An integer between 0 and 100 (100=law, 0=chaos). Returns -1 if the creature is not valid</returns>
 85        public int GetLawChaosValue(uint oCreature) =>
 086            _creatureAlignment.GetValueOrDefault(oCreature, new AlignmentData()).LawChaosValue;
 87

 13
 14        private class AssociateData
 15        {
 016            public AssociateType Type { get; set; } = AssociateType.None;
 017            public int FamiliarCreatureType { get; set; } = 0;
 018            public int AnimalCompanionCreatureType { get; set; } = 0;

 023        public void SetMaxHenchmen(int nNumHenchmen) => _maxHenchmen = nNumHenchmen;

 28
 29        public int LevelUpHenchman(uint oHenchman, string sClass = "", int nLevel = 1, bool bReadyAllSpells = true)
 030        {
 031            if (!_associateData.ContainsKey(oHenchman))
 032                _associateData[oHenchman] = new AssociateData();
 33
 034            _associateData[oHenchman].Type = AssociateType.Henchman;
 035            return 1; // Success
 036        }
 37
 038        public void SetAssociateListenPatterns(uint oTarget = OBJECT_INVALID) { }
 39
 40        public void RemoveSummonedAssociate(uint oMaster, uint oAssociate = OBJECT_INVALID)
 041        {
 042            if (oAssociate != OBJECT_INVALID)
 043            {
 044                _associateData.Remove(oAssociate);
 045                _masters.Remove(oAssociate);
 046            }
 047        }
 48
 49        public int GetFamiliarCreatureType(uint oCreature) =>

 52        public int GetAnimalCompanionCreatureType(uint oCreature) =>

 54

 57

 059            _associateData.GetValueOrDefault(oTarget, new AssociateData()).AnimalCompanionName;
 60
 61        public uint GetAssociate(AssociateType nAssociateType, uint oMaster = OBJECT_INVALID, int nTh = 1)
 062        {
 063            if (nAssociateType == AssociateType.Henchman && _henchmen.ContainsKey(oMaster))
 064            {
 065                var henchmen = _henchmen[oMaster];
 066                if (nTh > 0 && nTh <= henchmen.Count)
 067                    return henchmen[nTh - 1];
 068            }
 069            return OBJECT_INVALID;
 070        }
 71
 72        public void AddHenchman(uint oMaster, uint oHenchman = OBJECT_INVALID)
 073        {
 074            if (!_henchmen.ContainsKey(oMaster))
 075                _henchmen[oMaster] = new List<uint>();
 76
 077            if (oHenchman != OBJECT_INVALID && !_henchmen[oMaster].Contains(oHenchman))
 078            {
 079                _henchmen[oMaster].Add(oHenchman);
 080                _masters[oHenchman] = oMaster;
 081                _associateData[oHenchman] = new AssociateData { Type = AssociateType.Henchman };
 082            }
 083        }
 84
 85        public void RemoveHenchman(uint oMaster, uint oHenchman = OBJECT_INVALID)
 086        {
 087            if (_henchmen.ContainsKey(oMaster) && oHenchman != OBJECT_INVALID)
 088            {
 089                _henchmen[oMaster].Remove(oHenchman);
 090                _masters.Remove(oHenchman);
 091                _associateData.Remove(oHenchman);
 092            }
 093        }
 94
 95        public uint GetHenchman(uint oMaster = OBJECT_INVALID, int nNth = 1)
 096        {
 097            if (_henchmen.ContainsKey(oMaster) && nNth > 0 && nNth <= _henchmen[oMaster].Count)
 098                return _henchmen[oMaster][nNth - 1];
 099            return OBJECT_INVALID;
 0100        }
 101
 102        public void SummonAnimalCompanion(uint oMaster = OBJECT_INVALID)
 0103        {
 0104            if (oMaster != OBJECT_INVALID)
 0105            {
 0106                var companion = (uint)(_associateData.Count + 2000);
 0107                _associateData[companion] = new AssociateData
 0108                {
 0109                    Type = AssociateType.AnimalCompanion,
 0110                    AnimalCompanionCreatureType = 1,
 0111                    AnimalCompanionName = "Animal Companion"
 0112                };

 0114            }
 0115        }

 017                _data2DA[s2DA].Columns.ContainsKey(sColumn) &&
 018                _data2DA[s2DA].Columns[sColumn].ContainsKey(nRow))

 024        {

 029                    return columns[nColumnIdx];

 035            {

 41        public void ActionLockObject(uint oTarget)

 54        public void ActionOpenDoor(uint oDoor)
 055        {

 58

 66        public void ActionCloseDoor(uint oDoor)
 067        {

 069            data.IsOpen = false;
 70
 071            _doorActionHistory.Add(new DoorActionRecord
 072            {

 074                Target = oDoor
 075            });
 076        }
 77
 078        public uint GetBlockingDoor() => _blockingDoor;
 79
 80        public bool GetIsDoorActionPossible(uint oTargetDoor, DoorActionType nDoorAction)
 081        {
 082            var data = GetOrCreateDoorData(oTargetDoor);
 83
 084            return nDoorAction switch
 085            {
 086                DoorActionType.Open => !data.IsOpen,
 087                DoorActionType.Unlock => data.IsLocked,
 088                DoorActionType.Bash => data.IsOpen,
 089                DoorActionType.Ignore => data.IsOpen,
 090                DoorActionType.Knock => data.IsOpen,
 091                _ => true
 092            };
 093        }
 94
 95        public void DoDoorAction(uint oTargetDoor, DoorActionType nDoorAction)
 096        {
 097            var data = GetOrCreateDoorData(oTargetDoor);
 98
 099            switch (nDoorAction)
 100            {
 101                case DoorActionType.Open:
 0102                    data.IsOpen = true;
 0103                    break;
 104                case DoorActionType.Bash:
 105                    // Bash action - no state change
 0106                    break;
 107                case DoorActionType.Ignore:
 108                    // Ignore action - no state change
 0109                    break;
 110                case DoorActionType.Knock:
 111                    // Knock action - no state change
 0112                    break;
 113                case DoorActionType.Unlock:
 0114                    data.IsLocked = false;
 0115                    data.IsUnlocked = true;
 0116                    break;
 117            }
 118
 0119            _doorActionHistory.Add(new DoorActionRecord
 0120            {
 0121                Action = nDoorAction,
 0122                Target = oTargetDoor
 0123            });
 0124        }
 125
 126        private DoorData GetOrCreateDoorData(uint oDoor)
 0127        {
 0128            if (!_doorData.ContainsKey(oDoor))
 0129                _doorData[oDoor] = new DoorData();
 0130            return _doorData[oDoor];

 075        public int d2(int nNumDice = 1) => RollDice(2, nNumDice);

 85        private int RollDice(int nSides, int nNumDice)
 086        {
 087            int total = 0;
 088            var random = new Random();
 089            for (int i = 0; i < nNumDice; i++)
 090            {
 091                total += random.Next(1, nSides + 1);
 092            }
 093            return total;
 094        }
 95

 097        {

 099        }

 116        private int _eventArrayIndex = 0;
 117        private Json _eventPayload = new Json(0);

 19
 20        private class NuiWindowData
 21        {
 022            public string WindowId { get; set; } = "";
 023            public string ResRef { get; set; } = "";
 024            public Json NuiData { get; set; } = new Json(0);
 025            public int Token { get; set; } = 0;
 26        }
 27
 28        public int NuiCreateFromResRef(uint oPlayer, string sResRef, string sWindowId = "")
 029        {
 030            var token = _nextWindowId++;
 031            var windowData = new NuiWindowData
 032            {
 033                WindowId = sWindowId,
 034                ResRef = sResRef,
 035                Token = token
 036            };
 37
 038            if (!_playerWindows.ContainsKey(oPlayer))
 039                _playerWindows[oPlayer] = new Dictionary<int, NuiWindowData>();
 040            _playerWindows[oPlayer][token] = windowData;
 41
 042            return token;
 043        }
 44
 45        public int NuiCreate(uint oPlayer, Json jNui, string sWindowId = "")
 046        {
 047            var token = _nextWindowId++;
 048            var windowData = new NuiWindowData
 049            {
 050                WindowId = sWindowId,
 051                NuiData = jNui,
 052                Token = token
 053            };
 54
 055            if (!_playerWindows.ContainsKey(oPlayer))
 056                _playerWindows[oPlayer] = new Dictionary<int, NuiWindowData>();
 057            _playerWindows[oPlayer][token] = windowData;
 58
 059            return token;
 060        }
 61
 62        public int NuiFindWindow(uint oPlayer, string sId)
 063        {
 064            if (!_playerWindows.ContainsKey(oPlayer))
 065                return 0;
 66
 067            foreach (var window in _playerWindows[oPlayer].Values)
 068            {
 069                if (window.WindowId == sId)
 070                    return window.Token;
 071            }
 072            return 0;
 073        }
 74
 75        public void NuiDestroy(uint oPlayer, int nUiToken)
 076        {
 077            if (_playerWindows.ContainsKey(oPlayer))
 078                _playerWindows[oPlayer].Remove(nUiToken);
 079        }
 80

 1namespace SWLOR.Test.Shared.NWScriptMocks
 2{
 3    public partial class NWScriptServiceMock
 4    {
 5        // Mock data storage for party management
 16        private readonly Dictionary<uint, List<uint>> _partyMembers = new(); // Leader -> List of members
 17        private readonly Dictionary<uint, uint> _partyLeaders = new(); // Member -> Leader
 18        private readonly Dictionary<uint, Dictionary<int, bool>> _panelButtonFlash = new(); // Player -> Button -> Flash
 9
 10        public void AddToParty(uint oPC, uint oPartyLeader)
 011        {
 012            if (!_partyMembers.ContainsKey(oPartyLeader))
 013                _partyMembers[oPartyLeader] = new List<uint>();
 14
 015            if (!_partyMembers[oPartyLeader].Contains(oPC))
 016                _partyMembers[oPartyLeader].Add(oPC);
 17
 018            _partyLeaders[oPC] = oPartyLeader;
 019        }
 20
 21        public void RemoveFromParty(uint oPC)
 022        {
 023            if (_partyLeaders.ContainsKey(oPC))
 024            {
 025                var leader = _partyLeaders[oPC];
 026                if (_partyMembers.ContainsKey(leader))
 027                    _partyMembers[leader].Remove(oPC);
 028                _partyLeaders.Remove(oPC);
 029            }
 030        }
 31
 32        public void SetPanelButtonFlash(uint oPlayer, int nButton, int nEnableFlash)
 033        {
 034            if (!_panelButtonFlash.ContainsKey(oPlayer))
 035                _panelButtonFlash[oPlayer] = new Dictionary<int, bool>();
 036            _panelButtonFlash[oPlayer][nButton] = nEnableFlash != 0;
 037        }

 3    public partial class NWScriptServiceMock

 5        // Mock data storage for quest journal

 8        public class QuestEntry

 17        public void AddJournalQuestEntry(string szPlotID, int nState, uint oCreature, bool bAllPartyMembers = true, bool
 018        {

 21
 022            _questJournal[oCreature][szPlotID] = new QuestEntry
 023            {
 024                PlotID = szPlotID,
 025                State = nState,
 026                Description = sQuestDescription,
 027                Name = sQuestName
 028            };

 31        public void RemoveJournalQuestEntry(string szPlotID, uint oCreature, bool bAllPartyMembers = true, bool bAllEntr
 032        {
 033            if (_questJournal.ContainsKey(oCreature))
 034                _questJournal[oCreature].Remove(szPlotID);
 035        }
 36
 37        // Additional quest methods from INWScriptService
 38        public void AddJournalQuestEntry(string szPlotID, int nState, uint oCreature, bool bAllPartyMembers = true,
 39            bool bAllPlayers = false, bool bAllowOverrideHigher = false)
 040        {

 43
 044            _questJournal[oCreature][szPlotID] = new QuestEntry
 045            {

 047                State = nState
 048            };

 51        // Helper methods for testing

 013        {

 18        public string ResManFindPrefix(string sPrefix, ResType nResType, int nNth = 1, bool bSearchBaseData = false, str
 019        {

 023                return prefixes[nNth - 1];
 024            return "";

 20        public string GetStringRight(string sString, int nCount)
 021        {

 023                return "";
 024            if (nCount >= sString.Length)
 025                return sString;
 026            return sString.Substring(sString.Length - nCount);
 027        }

 29        public string GetStringLeft(string sString, int nCount)
 030        {

 032                return "";

 034                return sString;

 38        public string InsertString(string sDestination, string sString, int nPosition)
 039        {

 041                return sString ?? "";

 043                return sDestination;
 044            if (nPosition < 0)
 045                nPosition = 0;
 046            if (nPosition > sDestination.Length)
 047                nPosition = sDestination.Length;
 048            return sDestination.Insert(nPosition, sString);
 049        }
 50
 51        public string GetSubString(string sString, int nStart, int nCount)
 052        {
 053            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(sString) || nStart < 0 || nCount <= 0)
 054                return "";
 055            if (nStart >= sString.Length)
 056                return "";
 057            if (nStart + nCount > sString.Length)
 058                nCount = sString.Length - nStart;
 059            return sString.Substring(nStart, nCount);
 060        }
 61
 62        public int FindSubString(string sString, string sSubString, int nStart = 0)
 063        {
 064            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(sString) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(sSubString) || nStart < 0)
 065                return -1;
 066            if (nStart >= sString.Length)
 067                return -1;
 068            return sString.IndexOf(sSubString, nStart);
 069        }

 71        public bool TestStringAgainstPattern(string sPattern, string sStringToTest)
 072        {
 073            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(sPattern) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(sStringToTest))
 074                return false;
 75            try
 076            {
 077                var regex = new Regex(sPattern);
 078                var match = regex.Match(sStringToTest);
 079                if (match.Success)
 080                {
 081                    _matchedSubstrings.Clear();
 082                    foreach (Group group in match.Groups)
 083                    {
 084                        if (group.Success)
 085                            _matchedSubstrings.Add(group.Value);
 086                    }
 087                }
 088                return match.Success;
 89            }
 090            catch
 091            {
 092                return false;
 93            }
 094        }
 95
 96        public string GetMatchedSubstring(int nString)
 097        {
 098            if (nString >= 0 && nString < _matchedSubstrings.Count)
 099                return _matchedSubstrings[nString];
 0100            return "";
 0101        }

 1namespace SWLOR.Test.Shared.NWScriptMocks
 2{
 3    public partial class NWScriptServiceMock
 4    {
 5        // Mock data storage for time
 16        private int _currentHour = 12;
 17        private int _currentMinute = 0;
 18        private int _currentSecond = 0;
 19        private int _currentMillisecond = 0;
 10
 011        public bool GetIsDay() => _currentHour >= 6 && _currentHour < 18;
 12
 013        public bool GetIsNight() => _currentHour < 6 || _currentHour >= 18;
 14
 015        public bool GetIsDawn() => _currentHour >= 5 && _currentHour < 7;
 16
 017        public bool GetIsDusk() => _currentHour >= 17 && _currentHour < 19;
 18
 019        public float RoundsToSeconds(int nRounds) => nRounds * 6.0f;
 20
 021        public float HoursToSeconds(int nHours) => nHours * 3600.0f;
 22
 023        public float TurnsToSeconds(int nTurns) => nTurns * 60.0f;
 24
 025        public int GetTimeHour() => _currentHour;
 26
 027        public int GetTimeMinute() => _currentMinute;
 28
 029        public int GetTimeSecond() => _currentSecond;
 30
 031        public int GetTimeMillisecond() => _currentMillisecond;
 32
 33        // Helper methods for testing
 34        public void SetTime(int nHour, int nMinute = 0, int nSecond = 0, int nMillisecond = 0)
 035        {
 036            _currentHour = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(23, nHour));
 037            _currentMinute = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(59, nMinute));
 038            _currentSecond = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(59, nSecond));
 039            _currentMillisecond = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(999, nMillisecond));
 040        }

 43    }
